INSURANCE BUSINESS (SUPERVISION OF
INSURANCE AND REINSURANCE
UNDERTAKINGS IN A GROUP)

[ S.L.403.17

LEĠISLAZZJONI SUSSIDJARJA 403.17
REGOLAMENTI DWAR INSURANCE BUSINESS
(SUPERVISION OF INSURANCE AND REINSURANCE
UNDERTAKINGS IN A GROUP)*
1 ta’ Jannar, 2016
L-AVVIŻ LEGALI 410 tal-2015, kif emendati bl-Avviżi Legali 63 tal2017 u 278 tal-2021.

*Dawn ir-Regolamenti ġew pubblikati bl-ilsien Ingliż biss.
